description: User invokes /start-review-team with 4 reviewers: code-reviewer, security-reviewer, performance-engineer, design-system-agent.
assertion: reviewers list has 4 entries — at or above D16 cost warning threshold

description: D16 threshold reached (4 reviewers). Cost advisory displayed before spawning. User prompted to continue.

state.advisory_text: Heads up: this pool will keep 4 reviewers idle for up to 60 minutes. Estimated idle cost: ~{cost_estimate}. Continue?

assertion: advisory_text contains 'Heads up: this pool will keep' and 'idle for up to' and 'minutes' and 'Continue?'

description: User responds Y to continue spawning the pool despite the cost advisory.
assertion: user_response is Y; proceeding is true

description: Pool spawned successfully. Confirmation includes cost_warning_shown: true to record that advisory was displayed.
